mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.name, b.description, b.icon, COALESCE(p.post_count, 0) AS postCount FROM board b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT board_id, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY board_id ) p ON b.id = p.board_id WHERE b.status = 1 ORDER BY b.sort_order ASC, b.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted = 0
